reviews.review_msg: She is one of the best instructor I have ever met. It's easy to follow her and join in her class activities without any pressure. Her marking is clear and helpful.

She is a nice professor! She is very helpful whenever you have any questions or problems. The simulation project is fun and the study sheets for exams are effective.    I learned a lot from her including theories, practice and language!

There were too many written assignments due every week. She had rigid assignment instructions, which required additional clarity to actually do the work. She's also a tough grader who has unclear grading expectations. Overall, I'm disappointed I took this class with her since I didn't learn anything.
